name: refine_business_requirements
label: Refine Business Requirements
rules: Generate capability/function hierarchy before detailed use-case generation.
Include function id, name, description, and outcomes.
AI drafts first, then persist normalized JSON output.
When executed for a change request, consume the latest change impact report before updating BA artifacts.
In change-request mode, this command must run after evaluate_change_request and before elaborate_system_design.
In change-request mode, write command response to ai/02-refine-business-requirements.md and append impacted BA/doc files to changes/doc-changes.md.
